what_it_does: This file is a grounded synthesis document that consolidates findings from a six-area research wave about a live, guided, right-hand-man review surface for the Company product. It describes the intended experience, sorts current capabilities into ready/moderate/net-new buckets, identifies the make-or-break gaps, lists decisions for Tim, and proposes a build sequence.
observations: It explicitly corrects the anchor: the make-or-break is generate-for-mockups, not comprehension or consent.
A verified-by-use comprehension test is reported: Qwen3.5-4B explained the truncated C1-inbox mockup well at non-developer altitude.
The 14KB mockup-HTML injection cap is not cleared; IA-mobile at 73KB survives at roughly 19%.
Capabilities are grouped into Bucket A (ready), Bucket B (moderate wiring), and Bucket C (net-new/hard).
Bucket C-a, generate-for-mockups, is called the spine and the consistent frontier.
The built walkthrough engine raises on unregistered mockup addresses, so it cannot tour the proposals it exists to review.
Six named decisions for Tim are listed with options and a leaning recommendation for each.
A ten-step proposed build sequence is provided, ordered by dependency.
Evidence is tagged with a four-tier taxonomy: Observed, Inferred, Verified-by-use, External.
The surface is repeatedly characterized as designed-general, built-partial, live-unproven.
standouts: Comprehension is verified to work even with truncated mockup HTML.
Generate-for-mockups is identified as the single make-or-break missing piece.
The existing tour engine cannot handle unregistered mockup addresses.
Consent is already simple and built for the singular case.
Voice-in is reported as one of the strongest, nearly-ready legs.
conventions: Organized as headline, identity, build-map buckets, make-or-break, decisions, build sequence, closing.
Self-corrects prior anchor claims where the research disagreed.
Uses ASCII diagrams, checkmarks, and caution symbols to structure the experience description.
concerns: The verified-by-use claim rests on a single reported run under specific infrastructure conditions.
Dense file:line citations may drift as code changes.
The net-new bucket mixes architectural decisions with implementation estimates without explicit uncertainty or sizing.
Some decisions for Tim include leaning recommendations, slightly blurring neutral synthesis.
The 14KB cap impact on IA-mobile is stated without showing the truncation or measurement method.
notes: A grounded build-readiness synthesis for the Company's guided RHM review surface, locating the real work in mockup-aware tour and mockup-edit dispatch while confirming comprehension and consent are largely ready.
questions: What is the 'bridge + 4B brain' and why was it unavailable to companions during the wave?
How is the 14KB cap enforced and what truncation strategy is applied?
What is the precise distinction between a ui:// address and a mockup:// address?
What does 'claude -p' refer to and how would it be scoped and verified for mockup edits?
What is the relationship between up_translate/coa altitude-shaping and the front-end wiring?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: it presents itself as a corrected, evidence-grounded synthesis of the research wave into a build map and named decisions, and it does exactly that.
apparent_themes: Simple consent: one approve plus git revert.
Reuse existing wiring before building net-new architecture.
The right-hand-man as a single human-interaction organ.
intention_signals: It is trying to converge a sprawling research wave into one actionable, evidence-grounded build plan that corrects prior assumptions, names the real blockers, and hands Tim a decision set and build order for loop-prep.
novelty: A research-synthesis artefact that explicitly self-corrects the anchor, uses a four-tier evidence taxonomy, and reframes the product's make-or-break around mockup editability rather than comprehension or consent.
contribution: Provides a grounded, decision-ready synthesis that maps which capabilities are ready, which need wiring, and which are net-new, with a prioritized build sequence and named outcome decisions for the guided review surface.
summary_for_embedding: Grounded synthesis document assessing the Company's live guided right-hand-man review surface as designed-general, built-partial, and live-unproven, with a verified comprehension result and a make-or-break gap in mockup-aware tour and mockup-edit dispatch.
intention_for_embedding: To consolidate a six-area research wave into a corrected build map and decision set for preparing the guided review surface for loop-prep.
